wiki.summary: “Hot Boy” is the fourth track on Fête de la Vanille. It’s a high-energy track that addresses the name change from Lostrushi to Lucy Bedroque and the backlash from certain fans regarding this transition. However, the change wasn’t just a name; it marked an official turning point in Lucy’s music style, moving away from genres like “Sigilkore” and its associated artist’s and fanbase, and toward a new, handcrafted genre created by Lucy himself. Read more on Last.fm.
wiki.content: “Hot Boy” is the fourth track on Fête de la Vanille. It’s a high-energy track that addresses the name change from Lostrushi to Lucy Bedroque and the backlash from certain fans regarding this transition. However, the change wasn’t just a name; it marked an official turning point in Lucy’s music style, moving away from genres like “Sigilkore” and its associated artist’s and fanbase, and toward a new, handcrafted genre created by Lucy himself. The song shows similarities to Emergency #BedroqueK, as both tracks reflect an unapologetic stance on the name change and take jabs at fans who are critical of it Read more on Last.fm.
